creator: freebsd@sysctl.cz
text:
Hello i have problem redshift 
and randr

I set redshift -l 54.5:14.25 -t 5700:3600 -g 0.8 -m randr -v

and redshift wrote

Location: 54.500000, 14.250000
Brightness: 1.00
Gamma: 0.800, 0.800, 0.800
Gamma ramp size too small: 0
Failed to start adjustment method randr.

xxxx@ ~> xrandr -v --verbose 
xrandr program version       1.5.0
xrandr: Failed to get size of gamma for output default
Screen 0: minimum 1280 x 800, current 1280 x 800, maximum 1280 x 800
default connected 1280x800+0+0 (0x269) normal (normal) 0mm x 0mm
	Identifier: 0x268
	Timestamp:  18127
	Subpixel:   horizontal rgb
	Clones:    
	CRTC:       0
	CRTCs:      0
	Transform:  1.000000 0.000000 0.000000
	            0.000000 1.000000 0.000000
	            0.000000 0.000000 1.000000
	           filter: 
  1280x800 (0x269)  0.000MHz *current
        h: width  1280 start    0 end    0 total 1280 skew    0 clock   0.00KHz
        v: height  800 start    0 end    0 total  800           clock   0.00Hz
